'''Starburst''' was a mainstream band in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]]. Much of their [[Music/Legends|music]] was non-[[Politics/Legends|political]], leading to several [[scarlet]] ratings from the [[Imperial Board of Culture]].
